scenario.title: The Intent Router
scenario.context: Your customer service bot needs to route incoming messages to different AI handlers based on detected intent. Each intent type has its own specialized prompt and response format.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that classifies intent and routes to appropriate handlers with different processing logic.
constraints: Each intent routes to different handler prompt
scenario.exampleInput: Route customer message: 'I want to cancel my subscription but first tell me about the refund policy'. Intents: billing_inquiry, cancellation_request, account_help, general_question, complaint.
hints: Specify handler prompt for each intent

scoringGuide.excellent: All intents with descriptions and examples
